sections.sectionTitle: Sardis Pawlpite tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Sardis khua pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, Pasian Kha Siangtho sagih leh aksi sagih a neipa' thugen in: Note' gamtatnate ka thei a, note a si hinapi-in a hing min na pua uh hi
Tua ahih manin khua phawk un la, na neihlai sunte uh a beimang ma-in thasanpha kik un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasepnate uh Pasian' muhna-ah a cingtaak nai hetlo ahihna thu ka thei hi

Tua ahih manin note a hong kihilh na zaksa uh thute phawkkik un la, tua thute zui-in na mawhna panun kisik kik un. Khua na phawk kei uh leh note kiangah guta bangin ka hong pai ding a, ka hong tun'lam nangawn na thei kei ding uh hi
Ahi zongin Sardis khuasunga om note lakah a puan a ninsak nailo tawmkhat na om uh hi. Tua bang mite kilawm uh ahih manin kei tawh puanpak silhin ka tonkhawm ding uh hi

A gualzo mite in tua bangin puanpak silh ding uh a, a nungta mite a kikhumna laibu sung panin amaute' min ka phiat kei ding hi. Ka Pa leh ama vantung mite kiangah zong keima mite ahihna uh ka pulak ding hi
Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un.

sections.sectionTitle: Filadelfia Pawlpite tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Filadelfia khua pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, David' tawhtang kemin, ama hon'sa kong kuamah in a khak zawhloh, ama khaksa kong kuamah in a hon' zawhloh, a thuman a siangthopa' thugen in
Note' nasepnate ka thei hi. Na tha uh a hatloh hangin ka thu zui-in kei tungah na hong cihtakna uh ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin kuamah in a khak zawhloh ding kong, note' mai-ah hon'sa-in ka koih hi
Jew mi hilo napi-in Jew mi hi ung, ci-in zuau a gen Satan' pawlte, note' mai-ah hong paisakin na khephung uhah ka boksak ding a, note ka hong itna thu amaute ka theisak ding hi

Note in lungduai takin na thuakna ding uh ka hong thupiakna zui na hih manun leitunga a om mi khempeuh ze-etna dingin leitung bupah a hong tungding lungkhamna panin kei zong note ka hong suaktasak ding hi
Keimah ka hong pai baih ding hi. Kuamah in, na ngahding uh gualzawhna lukhu hong tuhkhak lohna dingun na neihsate uh hoihtakin na lenkip un

A gualzote pen ka Pasian' sutpi-in ka bawl ding a, amaute paikhia ngei nawnlo ding uh hi. Amaute tungah ka Pasian' min leh ka Pasian kiang vantung panin a hong paisuk ding Jerusalem khua thak min ka gelh ding a, amaute tungah keima min thak zong ka gelh ding hi
Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un.

sections.sectionTitle: Laodisia Pawlpite tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Laodisia khua pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, thuman leh citakin teci a pang, Pasian' pian'sakte khempeuh a kipatna ahi Amen' thugen in
Note' gamtatnate ka thei a, vot lah vot vetlo, sa lah sa vetloin na omna uh zong ka thei hi. A vot na hih kei uh leh a sa hi vet le uh cin ka ut hi
Ahi zongin note pen vot lah vot vetlo, sa lah sa vetloin a laklawhin om na hih manun ka kam sung panin ka hong siakhia ding hi
Note a zawng, a mittaw, puansilh ding a neilo, a hehpihhuai, a lungkhamhuai na hih lamtak uh theiloin, kote hau-in ka cithei uh a, bangmah kisapna ka nei kei uh hi, na ci uh hi

Tua ahih manin na hauhtheihna dingun kei kiang panin kham citak hong lei-in a zumhuaipi-in guaktanga na omna uh na kiselna dingun puanpak hong lei un la, khua na muhtheihna dingun mit zatui hong lei un
Ka it mite thuhilhin ka taii hi. Tua ahih manin lungsim tak tawh na mawhna panun kisik kik un
Kongkhakah dingin kong ka hong kiu hi. Ka aw za-in kong hong honte kiangah lutin an ka nekhawm ding uh hi
Keimah zong gualzo-in ka Pa' tokhomah ka tutkhawm uh mah bangin a gualzote khempeuh zong kei tawh ka tokhom tungah hong tutkhawm theihna dingun thu ka pia ding hi
Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi.
